scripts.build: npm run wasm:build && tsc -b && npm run build:browser
scripts.build:browser: npm run wasm:build && npm --workspace @aedventure/add-domain run build && vite build --config vite.config.mjs
scripts.dev:browser: npm run wasm:build && npm --workspace @aedventure/add-domain run build && vite --config vite.config.mjs --host 127.0.0.1
